mapper.select: SELECT SKILL_ID AS skillId, SKILL_NAME AS skillName, SKILL_TYPE AS skillType FROM SKILL WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SKILL_TYPE, SKILL_NAME

SELECT s.SKILL_ID AS skillId, s.SKILL_NAME AS skillName, s.SKILL_TYPE AS skillType FROM USER_INTEREST ui JOIN SKILL s ON ui.SKILL_ID = s.SKILL_ID WHERE ui.USER_ID = #{userId} AND s.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY s.SKILL_TYPE, s.SKILL_NAME
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_INTEREST ( USER_INTEREST_ID, USER_ID, SKILL_ID, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( USER_INTEREST_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{skillId}, SYSDATE )
